## GS_Acoustic

- **OWR-1228T-32B** — Speaker, 32 Ohms, 3W Rated Power, 12mm Diameter, 20Hz - 20kHz Frequency Range

## GS_Capacitor_0402

- **C_0402_100nF** — 100nF 10% Unpolarized Capacitor, 16V Max Voltage, X5R
- **C_0402_14pF** — 14pF 5% Unpolarized Capacitor, 50V Max Voltage, C0G
- **C_0402_4.7uF** — 4.7uF 20% Unpolarized capacitor, 6.3V Max Voltage, X5R

## GS_Connectors

- **Screw_Terminal_01x02_2.54mm_Xinya** — Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
- **USB_C_Socket_6P** — USB-C (USB TYPE-C) Receptacle Connector 6 Position Surface Mount, Right Angle
- **USB_C_Socket_SS** — USB Type-C Socket connector
- **XT60_M** — Vertical XT60 Male Connector

- **ESP32-PICO-KIT-1** — ESP32 development board
- **ESP32S3-R8N8-LCKFB** — ESP32-S3 Development Board
- **SSD1306_Breakout** — 0.96 inch OLED display

## GS_Diodes

- **D_Schottky_580mV_1A** — 40V 1A Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diode, SMB, 50nA Reverse Leakage, 580mV Forward Drop
- **D_Zener_6.2V_150mW** — 6.2V, 150mW, Zener diode
- **D_Schottky_550mV_3A** — Schottky Diode, 550mV Forward Drop at 3A, 40V Max Voltage, 3A Max Current, 500uA Reverse Leakage at 40V

## GS_EEPROM

- **W25Q128JVSIQ** — 128Mbit QSPI Serial EEPROM, SOIC-8

- **LT1161** — 8-48V Quad Protected High-Side MOSFET Driver

## GS_H_Bridges

- **DRV8876PWPR** — H-Bridge wih Integrated Current Sense and Regulation, 4.5V - 37V Input Voltage Range, 6A Max Current

## GS_IC

- **CAP1188** — 8 channel capacitive touch sensor and 8 channel LED driver
- **LM555** — Precision Timers, 555 compatible,  PDIP-8
- **TLC59116** — LED Driver 17V I2C 16 120mA 3V~5.5V TSSOP-28
- **USBLC6-2P6** — Very low capacitance ESD protection diode, 2 data-line, SOT-666

- **ADAFRUIT_BNO085** — 9 DoF IMU

- **FB_0603_120R** — Ferrite bead

- **IS31FL3729** — LED Driver 400kHz~1MHz PWM 16 35mA 2.7V~5.5V QFN-32-EP(4x4)

- **RP2040** — Dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ microcontroller, 264kB SRAM, 30 GPIO, USB 1.1, QFN-56

## GS_Switching_Regulators

- **AP63203WU-7** — 1.1MHz switching buck regulator, 2A 3.3V output voltage, 3.8V~32V input voltage
- **AP63301WU-7** — 500kHz Adjustable Buck Converter, 3A Max Current, 3.8V-32V Input Voltage
- **LM2596_Breakout** — 12V 3A Step-Down Voltage Regulator, TO-263
- **TPS54360DDAR** — 2.5MHz Adjustable Buck Converter, 4.5V-60V Input Voltage, 3.5A Max Current
- **TPS55340PWPR** — 1.14MHz Adjustable Boost Converter, 2.9V - 32V Input, 5A Max Current, 2.9V - 38V Output
- **TPS63700** — 1.38MHz Inverting Buck Boost, 2.7V - 5.5V Input Voltage, -15V - -2V Output Voltage

- **MOSFET_P-Ch_-30V_2A_80mR_-1Vth** — -4.8A Id, -20V Vds, 8V Vgs, 37mR Rds(on), P-Channel MOSFET, SOT-23
